title: Tokyo-2
wikitext:
'''Tokyo-2''' is the current capital of Japan in 2015, where the government relocated after the destruction of [[Old Tokyo]] by a nuclear bomb in the wars following [[Second Impact]] in 2000.  Tokyo-2 was built in the location of former Matsumoto City in Nagano prefecture. Construction began in 2001, and by early 2003 it had become the functional new capital city of the country.

=In Other Media=
In the 6th volume of the [[Shinji Ikari Raising Project (Manga)|Shinji Ikari Raising Project]] it is noted that [[Mana Kirishima]] and her parents lived in Tokyo-2, before moving to [[Tokyo-3]] for business reasons.<ref>Shinji Ikari Raising Project - Volume 6, Takahashi Osamu</ref>

html:
Tokyo-2 is the current capital of Japan in 2015, where the government relocated after the destruction of Old Tokyo by a nuclear bomb in the wars following Second Impact in 2000. Tokyo-2 was built in the location of former Matsumoto City in Nagano prefecture. Construction began in 2001, and by early 2003 it had become the functional new capital city of the country.

In Other Media[edit]

In the 6th volume of the Shinji Ikari Raising Project it is noted that Mana Kirishima and her parents lived in Tokyo-2, before moving to Tokyo-3 for business reasons.[1]

References[edit]

  1. ↑ Shinji Ikari Raising Project - Volume 6, Takahashi Osamu
